summary: Frontend-only smoke for landing iteration 3: SocialProof testimonial lightbox + new Packages 'Tre Soluzioni GB' section. All required interactions PASS. Landing loads cleanly (post 2.7s loader). #soluzioni renders heading 'Tre proposte. Una sola qualità.' and 3 cards (package-essenziale/premium/luxury) with poster images loading (naturalWidth >=1086 for all). Clicking package-premium and package-luxury opens [data-testid=package-dialog] with full poster image and 'Avvia la stima gratuita' CTA; closes via Escape. package-cta-essenziale scrolls to #configuratore (verified in viewport). All 4 testimonial cards present with images loaded; clicking testimonial-0 opens [data-testid=testimonial-dialog] with the full review image (naturalWidth=1122) and closes cleanly. No 404s observed on poster/testimonial images.

issues: A11y: Radix Dialog logs 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' and missing 'Description or aria-describedby'. Non-blocking but should add a VisuallyHidden DialogTitle for screen-reader compliance.

action_items: Optional a11y polish: wrap a VisuallyHidden <DialogTitle> inside both <DialogContent> in Packages.jsx and SocialProof.jsx and add aria-describedby/DialogDescription to silence Radix warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Packages.jsx and SocialProof.jsx are concise and well-structured; selected state correctly drives the controlled Dialog (open={!!selected}).
Posters and testimonial images use loading='lazy' which is good.
Tilt3D wrapping the button works; click still triggers selection (verified).
Minor a11y: shadcn DialogContent requires DialogTitle - currently absent in both new dialogs (warnings in console).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 verified: package lightboxes (premium/luxury) + testimonial-0 lightbox open; package-cta-essenziale scrolls to #configuratore. Only outstanding item is a11y DialogTitle in both new Dialog instances. Backend untouched (last 36/36 in iter 2).
